예쁜고래

Pretty Whale · Coffee Shop

A hidden gem by the sea — where every cup tells a story.

scroll
Our little harbor

A cozy two-floor cafe by Ilsan beach

Tucked into Ulsan's Ilsan beach neighborhood, 예쁜고래 is filled with vintage collectibles, handwritten chalkboard menus, and the warmth of a place that feels like home. Climb to the second floor for a quieter corner, or settle in downstairs among the curios.

We serve everything from specialty coffee to traditional Korean teas and homemade snow-flower bingsu — slow mornings and late nights welcome alike.

— see you by the sea 🐋

Why people stay

Three reasons to linger

🍧

Specialty Bingsu

Seasonal shaved ice made fresh daily, piled high and built to share.

🍵

20+ Teas

From traditional Korean grains to rare black teas — there's a brew for every mood.

🏠

Cozy Two Floors

Vintage decor, warm lighting, and a view near the sea — a hideaway worth finding.
